description_long: This is a modern bungalow set on a landscaped plot with lush green grass and clusters of large, light-gray rock formations surrounding the structure. The building features a flat roof, extensive use of glass for balcony railings and windows, and a clean, geometric design with white and blue exterior walls. The front facade includes a prominent balcony and a large entryway, while the rear and sides are bordered by natural rock outcrops and palm trees, blending the architecture with the environment. The bungalow appears to have two stories, with the upper level set back to create multiple terraces and outdoor spaces. The property is enclosed by a driveway and landscaped garden elements, enhancing its contemporary and open aesthetic. The overall impression is one of luxury and integration with nature, suitable for upscale urban or suburban neighborhoods.
description: A modern, two-story bungalow with flat roofs, white and blue facades, glass balconies, and surrounded by rocks and palm trees on a landscaped plot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large balcony with blue glass railings, and landscaped rocks and palm trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the setback upper story, side terrace, and dense rock formations with palm trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, additional balconies, and extensive rock landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the upper-level terraces, rear entry, and the integration of rocks and greenery.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and glass balcony railings
